title: Remove unauthenticated 64-byte prefix from sealed wire format
description: Callers of seal_message no longer prepend 64-byte self-asserted sender pub_id prefix. Sealed plaintext becomes just the MLS ciphertext. Receivers call process_incoming on the full HPKE plaintext and use the returned MLS-authenticated sender. Update cli/src/commands.rs, tui/src/event.rs, bot/src/dispatcher.rs, and relay/tests/sealed_sender_e2e.rs.
close_reason: implemented; build clean, all tests pass
